title: Delightful Smoked Irish Lemongrass-Takrai Skillet
description: A sweet and crunchy Irish dish featuring lemongrass-takrai, shio-cure, and a FODMAP-friendly twist served in an iron teppan skillet.
instructions: Heat the lemongrass-takrai oil in an iron teppan skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shio-cured salmon fillet and sear for 2 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to medium and add the butter milk, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and brown sugar until dissolved.
Add the fresh mint leaves and cook for an additional minute.
Season with sea salt to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8 minutes.
Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional fresh mint leaves, if desired.
